summary: This is a very brief 2004 blog post sharing an Amazon coupon code for tools purchases. Shapiro mentions being away and having issues with an e-cabinets supplier that he's not yet ready to discuss publicly. He also notes progress on a dinner table project. The post is essentially a quick personal update with a deal link.
key_points: Amazon coupon code for $25 off $199+ tool purchases
Shapiro is dealing with frustrations from an e-cabinets supplier but withholding public criticism until all options are exhausted
A dinner table woodworking project is progressing well
money_quotes: I want to exhaust every last option before I skewer them publicly, so I'm staying mum for the moment.
key_insight: A brief personal update from Shapiro's early blogging days showing his long-standing interest in maker projects and his measured approach to public criticism.
